feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Trump Says He Is Reimposing the U.S. Blockade of Iran
entry.content: The move would sharpen a standoff over control of Hormuz that has led to days of fighting.

entry.title: Lancashire chemicals factory facing potential legal claim announces closure
entry.content: More than 90 residents have expressed interest in contamination claim against AGC Chemicals EuropeA Pfas factory in Lancashire has announced plans to close down, just days after the Guardian revealed that more than 90 residents had signed up to be involved in a potential legal claim over contamination of the local area.AGC Chemicals Europe is consulting with employees and their union representatives about plans to cease operations at its manufacturing plant in Thornton-Cleveleys, Lancashire. The consultation is expected to last for at least 45 days. Continue reading...

entry.title: America’s Latest Weapon Against Iran: Sea Drones
entry.content: In a U.S. combat first, three unmanned speedboats attacked an Iranian submarine and ship facility.

entry.title: Judge says Trump admin attempted to ‘manipulate the judicial process’ with its IRS settlement
entry.content: A federal judge in Florida has found President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was brought in “bad faith” for an “improper purpose.”

entry.title: Oil Tanker Stock Benefits From Strait Of Hormuz Closure
entry.content: Oil Tanker Stock Benefits From Strait Of Hormuz Closure

entry.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
entry.content: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

entry.title: State AGs sue to block the Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger
entry.content: A dozen state attorneys general filed an antitrust lawsuit to stop the Paramount / Warner Bros. Discovery merger.

entry.title: These overlooked chip stocks are getting an AI boost
entry.content: These overlooked chip stocks are getting an AI boost

entry.title: Investors send General Fusion soaring in debut as first publicly traded fusion company
entry.content: General Fusion started trading on the Nasdaq following a reverse merger that saw high redemptions.

entry.title: Judge blocks Trump settlement with IRS that gave him sweeping tax protections
entry.content: Judge blocks Trump settlement with IRS that gave him sweeping tax protections

entry.title: Counterterrorism Police Probe Death of Former U.K. Government Minister
entry.content: Former Conservative Minister Ann Widdecombe was found dead in her home last week.

entry.title: 12 states sue to block Paramount’s $110B Warner Bros. deal
entry.content: The states allege that the deal would harm movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and audiences.

entry.title: Trump says U.S. will launch an 'Iranian blockade' in the Strait of Hormuz
entry.content: President Trump said the U.S. will reinstate a naval blockade on Iranian ships in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing attacks between the U.S. and Iran. NBC News' Matt Bradley reports on the ongoing power struggle for control of the strait.

entry.title: Trump recommends Lindsey Graham’s sister to finish his Senate term
entry.content: President Donald Trump said Monday that he has recommended to South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster that he choose Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham Nordone, to serve the remainder of the late Republican senator’s term, which ends in early January.

entry.title: 12 states file lawsuit to block $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros. merger
entry.content: Twelve state attorneys general filed a lawsuit challenging Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. NBC News' Allie Canal breaks down how the lawsuit says consumers could be impacted and what it could mean for Paramount.

entry.title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
entry.content: What does a world of total user-aligned AI actually look like?

entry.title: Games Done Quick abruptly canceled SNK stream due to ties with Saudi Arabia
entry.content: Games Done Quick said it would not accept funds from or work with SNK in the future.

entry.title: MLB All-Star rosters 2026: Full lists of starters, reserves for American & National leagues
entry.content: Therefore, here's a look at both the American League and National League rosters for the 2026 All-Star Game.

entry.title: Orioles acquire 8.44 ERA reliever in All-Star break trade with Pirates
entry.content: Baltimore makes an addition to its bullpen.

entry.title: Person reportedly shot and killed in incident involving ICE agent in Maine
entry.content: A person has been reportedly shot and killed in an incident involving an ICE agent in Biddeford, Maine. NBC News' Julia Ainsley has early details on the incident and how local and federal authorities are responding.

entry.title: 'Elite' Azzi Fudd kept Wings' winning streak alive with two clutch plays in 17 seconds
entry.content: The rookie is shining at both ends.

entry.title: Yankees' Ben Rice has a simple plan for MLB Home Run Derby in Philadelphia
entry.content: Ben Rice and his father Dan Rice know what to do during the Derby Monday night.

entry.title: Stretch, be gentle and build flexibility: expert tips on doing the splits
entry.content: Doing a split may look impressive, but experts caution it should not be done without practice and it may not be for everyoneOn Love Island USA’s recent eighth season, contestant Kenzie Annis quickly distinguished herself with her ability to perform the splits, abruptly deploying the maneuver in fits of both delight and rage.Seeing the splits on TV shows such as Love Island and RuPaul’s Drag Race can make people “want to take on that challenge and to push themselves to new heights”, said Ramoni Overton, a yoga instructor and YouTuber based in Los Angeles. Continue reading...

entry.title: Heat named landing spot for $349 million ex-Lakers guard, nine-time All-Star
entry.content: The Miami Heat were linked to a former Los Angeles Lakers backcourt contributor on Sunday.

entry.title: Braves' $20 million infield signing deemed 'massive whiff' at All-Star break
entry.content: This has turned out to be a very bad contract for Atlanta.

entry.title: We now know why LeBron James refused to be rushed into a final free agency decision
entry.content: LeBron James explores NBA free agency with 27 teams calling, prioritizing a fifth ring over money while evaluating pitches from the Cavs, Warriors, and Heat.

entry.title: The must-see Dallas Wings moment exposing Paige Bueckers' winning personality
entry.content: Dallas Wings star Paige Bueckers reunited courtside with Chicago Sky's DiJonai Carrington after a thrilling win, showing off their viral bond.

entry.title: Trump Regulators Seek to Discourage Loans to Undocumented Immigrants
entry.content: Guidance from the nation’s financial regulators urges banks to consider the risks of offering loans to immigrants not authorized to work in the U.S.

entry.title: Killings continue on Del Monte farm in Kenya, families say, after G4S hired for security
entry.content: Exclusive: Three men killed in incidents over past year allegedly involving G4S guards, who replaced in-house team after previous deathsBereaved families and politicians have raised alarm about continued killings on Del Monte’s pineapple farm in Kenya despite the company hiring G4S to replace its in-house security team after previous deaths were exposed by the Guardian.Del Monte appointed G4S to guard the farm, which is estimated to cover at least 40 sq km, the area of a small city, after the Guardian detailed allegations of brutal assaults and killings of people suspected of trespassing on its land. Kenyan police have been working with G4S to guard the site. Continue reading...

entry.title: France vs. Spain history: Head-to-head matches at World Cup, last meeting, team records and more
entry.content: Here's all you need to know about one of soccer's most storied international rivalries, which spans more than a century.

entry.title: Cavaliers predicted to land released $73M six-time All-Star to lure ex-Laker LeBron James home
entry.content: The Cleveland Cavaliers are one of many teams trying to lure in LeBron James. In this instance, they bring in a 17-year veteran to get James to sign with them one last time.

entry.title: Jerry Jones could soon face an unexpected Christian Parker problem
entry.content: Jerry Jones may face a new challenge if Christian Parker quickly transforms the Cowboys defense and emerges as a top NFL head coaching candidate.

entry.title: Jerry Jones may have a $100 million decision to make sooner than expected
entry.content: Jerry Jones could face a costly Quinnen Williams extension decision as the Cowboys weigh rising defensive tackle salaries before the market climbs again.

entry.title: The Houston Astros have a problem that no bullpen can keep fixing
entry.content: The Astros' overworked bullpen exposed a growing rotation problem before the All-Star break as Houston searches for second-half pitching stability.

entry.title: Yordan Alvarez's greatest strength has nothing to do with home runs
entry.content: Astros teammates explain why Yordan Alvarez's elite baseball IQ and preparation make him one of MLB's toughest hitters beyond his power.

entry.title: Iran says diplomacy continues despite ongoing attacks
entry.content: Iran attacks Persian Gulf states again after more U.S. strikes, but despite a week of renewed hostilities, Tehran says diplomacy also continues.

entry.title: Questions swirl over emergency exits in deadly Bangkok bar fire
entry.content: An investigation is underway into the cause of a deadly bar fire in Bangkok. There are questions about whether emergency exits may have been blocked. Anna Coren reports.

entry.title: Silver prices today, Monday, July 13, 2026: Silver prices falling after latest airstrikes on Iran
entry.content: Silver prices today, Monday, July 13, 2026: Silver prices falling after latest airstrikes on Iran

entry.title: Bison tosses man 8 feet in the air at Yellowstone, video shows
entry.content: A 65-year-old man was thrown 8 feet into the air by bison who charged at him in Yellowstone National Park, video shows.

entry.title: Sam Neill, "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano" star, dies at 78
entry.content: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, known for "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," died Monday at 78, his family says.

entry.title: Sam Neill, who starred in "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," dies at 78
entry.content: Actor Sam Neill, who starred in "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," died Monday at the age of 78, his family said in a statement. Neill had been battling cancer, but his family said he had beaten it and his death was unexpected.

entry.title: Video shows bison charging at 65-year-old man at Yellowstone National Park
entry.content: A bull bison chased a 65-year-old man through the trees and flipped him 8 feet into the air at Yellowstone National Park. A photographer who recorded the incident says the man was about 100 yards away with his grandson when the bison suddenly charged.

entry.title: Who could replace Lindsey Graham? South Carolina's next steps after senator's death
entry.content: Sen. Lindsey Graham's death has sparked a political scramble in South Carolina

entry.title: Uber’s robotaxi lobbying effort puts it on a collision course with Waymo
entry.content: Washington D.C. has become a battleground for Uber and Waymo's competing views.

entry.title: 5 questions Chipotle must answer to break out of its 2026 stock slump
entry.content: 5 questions Chipotle must answer to break out of its 2026 stock slump

entry.title: Crash of an aircraft helping to fight a Colorado wildfire leaves the pilot dead
entry.content: Authorities say an aircraft helping to fight a Colorado wildfire has crashed into a reservoir, killing the pilot

entry.title: Millions of Americans from coast to coast deal with dangerous weather
entry.content: Extreme heat shattered records in parts of the West on Sunday while fueling fires. Meanwhile, heavy rain and flash flooding hit communities in the South. Rob Marciano reports.

entry.title: U.S. and Iran continue to trade strikes amid battle over Strait of Hormuz
entry.content: The U.S. and Iran are once again trading attacks over control of the Strait of Hormuz. Weijia Jiang has the latest.

entry.title: Oppo Watch X3 review: Come for the battery, stay for the versatility
entry.content: Oppo's Watch X3 is a Wear OS watch that'll outlast all of its rivals.

entry.title: Russian Cyberattacks Stretching Back 15 Years Prompt European Sanctions
entry.content: Moscow is accused of a vast campaign of cyberattacks targeting governments and critical infrastructure across the continent.

entry.title: Massive AI buildout poses latest inflation threat as consumers pay more for laptops and electricity
entry.content: American consumers -- and the Federal Reserve -- are being hit with another high-cost headache.

entry.title: Europe takes step toward social media ban for kids
entry.content: Following a worrying new report, Europe is taking steps toward barring children from using social media.

entry.title: Businessman who sold land for Kushner resort in Albania suspected of faking the deeds
entry.content: Businessman who sold land for Kushner resort in Albania suspected of faking the deeds

entry.title: Nationals' James Wood leading off with record-breaking power
entry.content: Washington's All-Star right-fielder ended the first half on a historic 12-game offensive streak.

entry.title: Craig-Hallum Maintains a Buy on Intuitive Machines (LUNR) Despite 40% Decline Over the Past Month
entry.content: Craig-Hallum Maintains a Buy on Intuitive Machines (LUNR) Despite 40% Decline Over the Past Month

entry.title: Rocket Lab (RKLB) Announces Full Mission Success on VICTUS HAZE mission
entry.content: Rocket Lab (RKLB) Announces Full Mission Success on VICTUS HAZE mission

entry.title: Pythons' extreme biology may hold clues for treating human disease
entry.content: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime.

entry.title: See How Ukraine Is Taking Out Russia’s Refineries
entry.content: Attacks by long-range drones have unleashed a fuel crisis in Russia and won rare praise for Ukraine from President Trump.

entry.title: What channel is the Home Run Derby on tonight? Time, schedule, live streams and more to watch 2026 MLB contest
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about the 2026 Home Run Derby, including TV channel and streaming options for the MLB competition.

entry.title: Home Run Derby bracket 2026: Full list of contestants, odds, predictions for the winner
entry.content: Here's what you need to know about the 2026 Home Run Derby, including the bracket and odds.

entry.title: Eat your ice cream for a long, healthy life? This doctor says so
entry.content: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.

entry.title: Why is the Home Run Derby only on Netflix? Explaining streaming platform's 2026 baseball special
entry.content: The streaming service is broadcasting three special events during the MLB season.

entry.title: MLB Home Run Derby format, explained: What to know about new rules, changes in 2026
entry.content: This year's event at Citizens Bank Park is set to feature elements from past Home Run Derbys.

entry.title: Home Run Derby announcers: Meet Netflix's broadcast team for MLB All-Star event, from Barry Bonds to Michael Irvin
entry.content: Meet Netflix's roster for the 2026 Home Run Derby.

entry.title: Who is pitching to Jac Caglianone in the Home Run Derby? Meet Jeff Caglianone, dad of Royals budding star
entry.content: The Royals' young slugger will have his father throwing pitches at the 2026 Home Run Derby.

entry.title: Who is pitching to Bryce Harper in the Home Run Derby? Why Dodgers coach Dino Ebel is paired with Phillies star
entry.content: Harper is aiming to put on a show for his home fans with a non-Phillies coach throwing pitches.

entry.title: Fire Tears Through Bangkok Bar, Kills at Least 27
entry.content: Authorities said more than 70 people were injured in the blaze, with 45 still missing.

entry.title: Davies' discus passion renewed for Commonwealth Games
entry.content: Aled Sion Davies feels he has opened Pandora's Box before what could be his final Commonwealth Games with Wales.

entry.title: Penn State Football Preview 2026: Can Matt Campbell Win the Big Games?
entry.content: Penn State has the schedule, the transfers, and a new head coach in Matt Campbell who has just one job - win everything.

entry.title: Several Premier League clubs interested in exit-linked Real Madrid star – Romano
entry.content: Real Madrid’s pre-season is set to begin today, and one of the first-team players who will be working with Jose Mourinho from day one is Eduardo Camavinga.The French midfielder has not enjoyed the ...

entry.title: Barcelona president Joan Laporta addresses Ferran Torres future in the wake of PSG links: ‘I’ve heard about it’
entry.content: Barcelona transfer news continues to be dominated by uncertainty surrounding Ferran Torres after Paris Saint-Germain emerged as serious admirers of the Spanish attacker. The development has gathered ...

entry.title: Richard Hughes has the chance to give Liverpool the perfect parting gift
entry.content: Richard Hughes seems destined to leave Liverpool by the start of the 2026-27 season. Talk of the Englishman looking for a way out of Anfield has been rife for a while now.Most people thought that his ...

entry.title: Ederson: Atalanta’s stance on player revealed after United move collapses
entry.content: Manchester United have all but completed a deal for Chelsea’s Antony Santos after news of a move broke rapidly last week.Difficult windowNonetheless, their transfer market activity has been a frustr...

entry.title: Haway The Podcast | SUNLUN AT THE WORLD CUP | How Did The Lads Get On?
entry.content: Join the Lads as they chat about how all of Sunderland’s players got on at this year’s World Cup!

entry.title: Celtic boss resigned to losing Engels and Maeda - gossip
entry.content: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill expects to lose Daizen Maeda and Arne Engels this summer as Rangers counterpart Derek McInnes admits he needs departures before more signings.

entry.title: Sam Neill, actor known for ‘Jurassic Park,’ dies at 78
entry.content: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor best known for his role in the “Jurassic Park” movies, has died, his family said Monday.

entry.title: Cavaliers' Kenny Atkinson drops strong ex-Laker LeBron James hint amid free agency rumors
entry.content: The Cleveland Cavaliers are doing whatever it takes to reunite with LeBron James. Head coach Kenny Atkinson just gave major insight into their offseason plans.

entry.title: LeBron James emerges as Lakers' biggest threat in pursuit of Warriors NBA champion Jonathan Kuminga
entry.content: The Los Angeles Lakers are in hot pursuit of Jonathan Kuminga. Even though LeBron James is gone, he might still find a way to get back at the Lakers for their fading relationship.

entry.title: Lakers' $66M promising duo makes shocking Summer League decision amid trade rumors
entry.content: The Los Angeles Lakers have had some guys on the trade block for some time. However, with the appearances at Summer League, the vibe seems to be odd.

entry.title: Alex Caruso sends a clear message on Thunder’s strategy at the American Century Championship
entry.content: Alex Caruso believes in what the Oklahoma City Thunder have built and told me so at the 2026 American Century Championship.

entry.title: What time is the Home Run Derby tonight? TV channel, schedule and more to watch 2026 MLB All-Star event
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about watching the Home Run Derby, including the full schedule and start times for all of All-Star Week.

entry.title: Lakers officially sign $185M fan favorite, Luka Doncic's partner in crime for third straight season
entry.content: The Los Angeles Lakers made one of their offseason signings official on Sunday. Luka Doncic's future with another LA superstar is a done deal.

entry.title: Mini-pitches bringing soccer to new U.S. neighborhoods
entry.content: With the World Cup boosting America's interest in the game, one organization is building hundreds of smaller soccer pitches across the country. Michael George shows how it's changed a New Jersey school in the shadow of MetLife Stadium, where the World Cup final will take place.

entry.title: Caleb Wilson thinks UNC making him not shoot threes helped him reach the Bulls
entry.content: Caleb Wilson has become a knockdown shooter after joining the Chicago Bulls.

entry.title: Museums catching World Cup fever
entry.content: As World Cup teams head into the final stretch of the tournament, museums around the country are seizing on the renewed interest in soccer. There are special exhibits that explain aspects of the game that might surprise you. Bradley Blackburn reports.

entry.title: Training World Cup fans on how to perform CPR
entry.content: As the World Cup continues, the American Heart Association has a big goal of its own: to save lives with simple CPR training. Bradley Blackburn reports.

entry.title: Brady Tkachuk reps Team USA at the American Century Championship in a unique way
entry.content: Brady Tkachuk wore his Olympic gold medal during the 2026 American Century Championship at the Edgewood Tahoe Resort.

entry.title: Read full episode transcripts of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" from 2026
entry.content: Browse all of our full episode transcripts from 2026 of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan."

entry.title: Full transcript of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," July 12, 2026
entry.content: On this "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" broadcast, Republican Sen. Tim Scott remembers Lindsey Graham, and Israeli Ambassador Michael Leiter and retired Gen. Frank McKenzie discuss the Iran war.

entry.title: Spokane man completes number of grappler pullups for Guinness World Record attempt
entry.content: Jul. 12—Most people might spend their birthday relaxing with their loved ones by lounging by the river with a beer in hand. Most don't decide to break fitness world records on their special day. Lance Pecht, a former Whitworth University basketball player, spent his 43rd birthday Sunday at Body Unlimited Fitness, attempting the Guinness World Record for the most grappler pullups in one minute. ...

entry.title: Arizona Cardinals training camp roster preview: OL Ka'ena De Cambra
entry.content: We will preview every player on the Cardinals roster leading up to training camp. This is about OL Ka'ena De Cambra.

entry.title: Spokane Indians drop series finale to Eugene 9-5; head into MLB All-Star break in first | NWL baseball
entry.content: Jul. 12—EUGENE — Eugene's Lisbel Diaz hit two two-run home runs and the Spokane Indians lost to the Emeralds 9-5 in the finale of a six-game High-A Northwest League series at PK Park on Sunday. Diaz finished 2-for-4 with four RBIs. The Indians (14-7) were led by Jacob Hinderleider, who had two hits, including a home run, and three RBIs. Indians outfielder Tommy Hopfe hit the first pitch of the ...

entry.title: Rays 2026 Draft: Rounds 11-20
entry.content: The back half of the MLB Draft is where we leave the bonus pool minimums behind. Some players might sign for pretty decent amounts, but it’s the wild west and most will not demand much compensation to fill the Rays org needs. Out of their 21 selections overall, the Rays took 17 pitchers, and that […]

entry.title: Husker Wrestling: Incoming Freshman Parrow Wins Fargo National Title in Freestyle
entry.content: Nebraska also had 2027 commit Mac Crosson in the final, while Mason Petersen took 6th place

entry.title: 58 million under heat alerts as extreme temperatures scorch western U.S.
entry.content: Heat alerts were issued for millions across parts of the western U.S. Sunday as an unusually prolonged heat dome reached its peak.

entry.title: Frank Vogel expected to join Golden State Warriors' coaching staff
entry.content: Former Los Angeles Lakers head coach Frank Vogel will reportedly join Steve Kerr's coaching staff in Golden State. Here's the latest.

entry.title: Mets' 2026 MLB Draft recap: New York replenishing farm system after 19 players selected
entry.content: The 2026 MLB Draft was a very important draft to help the Mets replenish a farm system that dropped to the No. 24 ranked system in baseball according to Baseball America.

entry.title: Top Arizona prospect signs with Texas A&M after going undrafted
entry.content: A&M strengthened its 2026 class as top Arizona prospect Ryan Harwood confirmed his commitment after the MLB Draft, adding elite power and athleticism.

entry.title: Extreme heat, wildfires and severe thunderstorms affecting millions across the U.S.
entry.content: More than 58 million Americans under weather alerts Sunday as wildfires burn in the west and severe thunderstorms impact large swaths of the country. Carter Evans reports and Andrew Kozak takes a look at the forecast.

entry.title: Justice Department Investigating Allegation Against UAW President Shawn Fain
entry.content: A federal monitor tasked with overseeing the union said Fain acted improperly to benefit his fiancée.
